articles.title: Nike Q3 Preview: Gross Margin Contract, Decline In Total Sales On Soft China Performance
articles.summary: Nike Inc (NYSE: NKE) is expected to report a 200-basis-point contraction in gross margins and a 0.4% decline in total sales for Q3 fiscal 2026, largely due to a 16% sales contraction in China. BofA Securities analyst Lorraine Hutchinson maintained a Buy rating with a $73 price target, noting that while North America shows progress, EMEA sales were flat, and gross margins faced pressure from tariff headwinds. Nike's stock was down 1.03% to $52.94, trading near its 52-week low.
articles.text_to_analyze: Nike Q3 Preview: Gross Margin Contract, Decline In Total Sales On Soft China Performance. Nike Inc (NYSE: NKE) is expected to report a 200-basis-point contraction in gross margins and a 0.4% decline in total sales for Q3 fiscal 2026, largely due to a 16% sales contraction in China. BofA Securities analyst Lorraine Hutchinson maintained a Buy rating with a $73 price target, noting that while North America shows progress, EMEA sales were flat, and gross margins faced pressure from tariff headwinds. Nike's stock was down 1.03% to $52.94, trading near its 52-week low.
